summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Analytics (Fase 5) feature. Backend API fully functional with all expected data and filters working correctly. Frontend UI renders properly with KPI cards, charts, and interactive filters. Minor development environment issues (webpack overlay) do not affect core functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Webpack dev server overlay interferes with refresh button click in development environment
minor_issues.note: Development environment issue only, does not affect production

minor_issues.issue: Minor DOM attachment timing issue when selecting category filter options
minor_issues.note: Filter works but has occasional timing glitch

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication with admin credentials
Backend: Stock Analytics endpoint returns correct JSON structure
Backend: Expected seed data matches (sku_count=11, fast=3, slow=8, dead=0, never_sold=6)
Backend: Thresholds are configurable and correct (30/90/90)
Backend: Internal consistency - by_class counts match row classifications
Backend: Warehouse filter works correctly
Backend: Category filter works correctly
Backend: Classification logic is correct (Fast ≤30d, Slow ≤90d, Dead >90d)
Backend: Never sold items are downgraded from Fast to Slow
Backend: Sold qty window logic is correct (never_sold items have sold_qty=0)
Backend: Permission check works (requires product:view)
Backend: Read-only verification - Data integrity check passed (119 PASS / 0 FAIL)
Frontend: Login with demo admin button works
Frontend: Navigation to Stock Analytics (Gudang group → Stock Analytics)
Frontend: Stock Analytics view loads with data-testid='stock-analytics-view'
Frontend: All 5 KPI cards render with correct data (Total Value, Fast, Slow, Dead, Never Sold)
Frontend: KPI card filtering works (clicking Fast filters table to show only fast items)
Frontend: Search functionality works (filters rows by SKU/name)
Frontend: Warehouse filter works (filters data by warehouse)
Frontend: Pie chart 'Distribusi Nilai per Klasifikasi' renders correctly
Frontend: Bar chart 'Aging Persediaan' renders correctly
Frontend: Table 'Rincian per SKU' displays rows with classification badges
Frontend: No console errors during testing

tests.name: Permission Check
tests.details: Endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)

tests.name: Stock Analytics Basic (entity_id=all)
tests.details: Returns correct structure with thresholds, summary, by_class, aging_buckets, rows

tests.name: Seed Data Verification
tests.details: sku_count=11, fast=3, slow=8, dead=0, never_sold=6 (all match expected)

tests.name: Warehouse Filter
tests.details: Filters data by warehouse_id correctly

tests.name: Category Filter
tests.details: Filters data by category correctly, all rows match filter

tests.name: Classification Logic
tests.details: All classifications correct: Fast ≤30d, Slow ≤90d, Dead >90d, never_sold downgraded

tests.name: Sold Qty Window
tests.details: sold_qty_window > 0 only for products with sales in velocity window

tests.name: Data Integrity (Read-Only)
tests.details: verify_data_integrity.py: 119 PASS / 0 FAIL - no data mutation

tests.name: KPI Card: Total Value
tests.details: Displays Rp 533.7 jt, 11 SKU

tests.name: KPI Card: Fast Moving
tests.details: Displays 3, Rp 160.2 jt

tests.name: KPI Card: Slow Moving
tests.details: Displays 8, Rp 373.6 jt

tests.name: KPI Card: Dead Stock
tests.details: Displays 0, Rp 0

tests.name: KPI Card: Never Sold
tests.details: Displays 6

tests.name: KPI Card Filtering - Fast
tests.details: Clicking Fast KPI filters table to show only fast items

tests.name: KPI Card Filtering - Total Value
tests.details: Clicking Total Value shows all items

tests.name: Search Functionality
tests.details: Search box filters rows by SKU/name

tests.name: Warehouse Filter
tests.details: Filters data by warehouse (tested with Gudang Jakarta Utara)

tests.name: Category Filter
tests.details: Works but has DOM attachment timing issue

tests.name: Pie Chart Renders
tests.details: Distribusi Nilai per Klasifikasi chart displays correctly

tests.name: Bar Chart Renders
tests.details: Aging Persediaan chart displays correctly

tests.name: Table Displays Rows
tests.details: Rincian per SKU table shows rows with data

tests.name: Classification Badges
tests.details: Classification badges (Fast/Slow/Dead) display correctly

tests.name: Refresh Button
tests.details: Webpack dev server overlay interferes with click (dev env only)

tests.name: No Console Errors
tests.details: No JavaScript console errors during testing
